name: social-founder-linkedin
prompt: We're a B2B payroll startup. I want to build our founder's audience on LinkedIn from basically zero. Give me an approach and a few post ideas.
expected_output: Platform-native LinkedIn strategy: story-to-lesson/contrarian formats, hook + white-space mechanics, engagement/first-hour and links-in-comments guidance, plus concrete post ideas — not generic 'post consistently'.
assertions: Gives LinkedIn-native tactics (e.g. personal-story-to-lesson or contrarian posts, short lines/white space, the ~210-char hook before 'see more')
Provides concrete, specific post ideas tailored to a B2B payroll founder, not just abstract advice
Mentions an engagement/distribution mechanic (early-hour engagement, comments, or putting links in the first comment)
Goes beyond generic 'be consistent / post daily' filler with real mechanics
No fabricated metrics; any numbers are illustrative or marked
